docket_entries.description: ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63 AS TO DEFENDANT RANDALL, REBECCA A.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ATLANTIC CREDIT & FINANCE INC ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 2.0 HOURS
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF ATLANTIC CREDIT & FINANCE INC

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON NOV-26-2008 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT REBECCA RANDALL'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY GIVEN TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON; CLERK: E. BURA; REPORTER: PAULA SHI CSR# 13358 (D206)
